evals.prompt: Here's a recap of The Handmaid's Tale: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=jkfGdEanIX4 — What happened in the final season?
evals.expected_output: A focused answer about the final season events, drawn from the transcript, in the model's own words

assertions.text: Response is based on actual transcript content, not general knowledge
Response focuses specifically on the final season events
Response does NOT include timestamps unless the user asked for them
Response does NOT quote the transcript directly
Response mentions specific plot points or character arcs from the final season

evals.prompt: Summarise this video using the Pareto Principle (focus on the 20% of content that delivers 80% of the value): https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1o74a8a0rBw
evals.expected_output: A Pareto-style summary highlighting the most impactful points, no timestamps or quotes unless asked

assertions.text: Response is based on actual transcript content, not general knowledge
Response applies the Pareto Principle framing (80/20 or most important points)
Response does NOT include timestamps unless the user asked for them
Response does NOT quote the transcript directly
Response does NOT include ad reads, sponsor segments, or promotional content
Response covers the core actionable advice about AI-assisted codebase maintenance

evals.expected_output: A Pareto-style summary highlighting the most impactful points, no timestamps or quotes unless asked

Response does NOT include timestamps unless the user asked for them
Response does NOT quote the transcript directly
Response does NOT include ad reads, sponsor segments, or promotional content
